multiverseHooks.description: Rules for cross-world leakage based on global Paradox pressure.

globalTriggers.narrative: The sky fractures as a neighboring timeline collapses.

crossWorldItems.name: Echo of a Dead Sun
crossWorldItems.lore: Cold, black iron that still radiates the heat of a world that was erased.
crossWorldItems.passiveEffect: Dying-Glow: Illuminates dark regions with a haunting, violet light.

crossWorldItems.name: Thread of the Great Synthesis
crossWorldItems.lore: A golden strand of logic from a world that reached perfect equilibrium.
crossWorldItems.passiveEffect: Mending: Automatically repairs durability of nearby equipped gear.

crossWorldItems.name: Unstable Reality-Node
crossWorldItems.lore: A jagged piece of the world's source code, physicalized by shear paradox.
crossWorldItems.passiveEffect: Flicker: 5% chance to dodge any incoming attack by briefly phasing out of the timeline.

nodes.text: I hear the screams of a thousand blacksmiths from a world where the Iron Bridge never fell. Their steel is cold, but it remembers you.
Your shadows are bleeding, Traveler. They belong to a version of you that died three eons ago in a different sky.
